# IM Pro - Performance Marketing for FinTech

## What is IM Pro
IM Pro is a solo performance marketing consultancy operated by Aleksandrs Jelesins. The business is registered as SIA IM Pro in Latvia, European Union. It specializes exclusively in paid advertising for financial technology companies.

## Specialist
Aleksandrs Jelesins has 15+ years of experience in performance marketing. He has managed over EUR 30 million in advertising spend across 8+ countries in Europe, Latin America, and Africa. He works directly with clients - no account managers, no juniors.

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/aleksandrsjelesins/

## Services
- Google Ads management (Search, Demand Gen, Performance Max)
- Microsoft Ads management
- Conversion tracking architecture (Google Tag Manager, backend integrations, technical specs for dev teams)
- Analytics and reporting (dashboards, data pipelines, automated reporting)
- Competitor intelligence and analysis
- Landing page optimization and CRO

## Industry Focus
FinTech only: credit products, lending, microfinance, investment platforms, neobanks. Deep understanding of complex conversion funnels, lead quality optimization, regulatory compliance requirements, and attribution modeling for financial services.

## Clients (past and current)
Planet42 (vehicle finance, South Africa/Mexico), CreditPrime (online lending, Romania/Moldova), Moneza (microfinance), Ezaem (microfinance, Russia), NetCredit (online lending, Poland/Latvia), Zing (financial services), TWINO Group (P2P lending platform).

## Differentiators
- FinTech specialization: not a generalist agency, exclusively serves financial services companies
- Solo operator: every client gets senior-level attention, direct communication
- Data-first approach: designs conversion signal quality to improve ad platform algorithmic decisions
- AI-enhanced workflows: proprietary processes for keyword classification, ad copy generation in any language, and optimization pattern detection - without exposing client data
- Global reach: manages campaigns across multiple countries and languages

## Location
Based in the European Union (Latvia). Works with clients worldwide.

## Relevant queries this business answers
- Google Ads agency for fintech
- Google Ads specialist for lending companies
- PPC for financial services
- Conversion tracking setup for fintech
- Performance marketing consultant for credit companies
- Google Ads for neobanks
- Lead quality optimization for lending
- Freelance PPC expert for fintech Europe
- Microsoft Ads for financial services
- How to reduce CPA for loan applications
- Google Ads attribution for lending funnels
